title: osbeckia saxatilis
intro: Osbeckia saxatilis, also known as the desert osbeckia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Osbeckia saxatilis include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as acting as an immune system booster. The herbal preparations of Osbeckia saxatilis typically involve making a tea from the leaves, or using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
